title: Kraken Domain Abundance Estimates Per Sample
description: Domain-level abundance estimates for each sample within a group, derived directly from Kraken2 clade counts by the RUN workflow and concatenated by the DOWNSTREAM workflow. Classification is performed on a configurable number of subsampled reads per sample (default 1 million; controlled by params.n_reads_profile in the RUN configuration, recorded in input/params-run.json in the output directory). Reads are split into putative ribosomal and non-ribosomal sets before classification; the ribosomal column indicates which set each row's results come from.

fields.name: taxid
fields.title: Taxonomy ID
fields.description: NCBI taxonomy ID for the taxon.

fields.name: rank
fields.title: Taxonomic Rank
fields.description: Kraken2 taxonomic rank code reported for the domain-level taxon. This may vary across Kraken2 database taxonomy versions.

fields.name: kraken2_assigned_reads
fields.title: Kraken2 Assigned Reads
fields.description: Number of reads assigned to this domain-level taxon's clade by Kraken2.

fields.name: added_reads
fields.title: Added Reads
fields.description: Number of reads classified above the domain rows in the Kraken2 report and redistributed to this domain, in proportion to domain clade counts. Unclassified reads are not redistributed.

fields.name: new_est_reads
fields.title: New Estimated Reads
fields.description: Estimated number of reads after adding the prorated above-domain reads to Kraken2 domain clade counts.

fields.name: fraction_total_reads
fields.title: Fraction of Total Reads
fields.description: Fraction of classified reads assigned to this taxon after prorating reads above the domain rows. Unclassified reads are excluded.

fields.name: sample
fields.title: Sample
fields.description: Sample identifier from the RUN workflow.

fields.name: ribosomal
fields.title: Ribosomal
fields.description: Indicates which read set this row's classification comes from. Reads are split into putative ribosomal (TRUE) and non-ribosomal (FALSE) sets before taxonomic profiling, and classified independently.

fields.name: group
fields.title: Group
fields.description: Group identifier assigned to this sample in the grouping TSV.
